review_title: An easiest form builder with modifiable attributes
author: Md Jahan M.
pros: "123FormBuilder" - The easiest way to create a form with your own design. It has available various elements to customize the form fields. I'm using this tool for my WIX website that helps me to connect customer services. Perfect!
cons: There are no severe issues, but it would be beneficial to update by counting the most recent features.
author_profession: Digital Marketing | Web Development & Design Specialist - Freelance

review_title: 123FormBuilder has become a powerful tool for my company!
description: I have been using 123FormBuilder for 1 year in my company and its forms solve 99% of the problems I have.
author: Tulio A.
pros: The number of fields for forms is countless! In addition, 123FormBuilder has several security mechanisms that allow the form to be used for any use. Even for contests! The ease of creation and finding what you need, and if you don't find what you are looking for, the service always answers you in 1 day! Our company will not stop using 123FormBuilder anytime soon!
cons: There are very few weaknesses of 123FormBuilder, the only thing I could think of was having a chat so I could have my questions answered, but by email, I always get the answer by the end of the day.

review_title: After over 4 years of daily use, they held my data hostage when I tried to downgrade
description: After several years of using the forms almost on a daily basis on the Gold Plan, last year I went through personal tragedies, closed my business, lost my job and no longer needed nor could afford to continue the paid plan. This year as I am recovering, I will be creating possibly 3-5 forms in a year compared to 30+ forms per year in the past. When I tried to create a free form, I realized 123formbuilder had put security blocks so I couldn't access my old forms, data or even create new forms. They wouldn't even let me delete old forms without upgrading and paying for a Gold plan. I could log in, but then any activity I tried, I would be directed to a page to upgrade with no other option. I have been going back and forth the past week with customer service. They released the block at first when I first contacted them, and since their email had gone to spam, I never saw that they gave me a 3 days window to delete all forms. I just proceeded with creating one form, uploaded to my website, started getting applications, and went back to the "upgrade or else" page. I explained my situation to the customer service rep and pleaded to use the free service, said I wouldn't use more than 5 forms as per the free agreement, asked as a long term client if I could keep the current form with 10+ fields (I was willing to edit and remove excess fields if that wouldn't be allowed). But she just blocked me from even being able to access the form submissions and kept pushing me to pay!
author: Tanzina A.
pros: Only workable on upgraded paid services.
cons: Even with the upgraded paid plan, it is very tedious to customize each new form even though they are duplicated. I was creating new sign up forms (duplicates of past week's form) every 1-2 weeks throughout the year, and had to customize every detail on the notification emails and thank you messages every single time. When you try to delete multiple fields, you have to do it one by one, can't select multiple fields. Customer service is terrible!!!

author: Kathy H.
pros: This software is a must-have for my business. It offers everything I need as it offers over 2000 template forms and has comprehensive form solutions. Integrates well with numerous software programs.
cons: Forms sometimes freeze when integrated into Wix websites.

author: Abdul Hakim S.
pros: 123FormBuilder allows users to create intuitive, functional, and aesthetically pleasing forms quickly and easily. I appreciated the user-friendly interface and the many customizations available to tailor the form to meet my exact requirements. Additionally, the platform offers helpful integrations with other popular services, making linking up my forms with other solutions simple.
cons: I found certain editing features quite complicated in the free version of 123FormBuilder. For example, adjusting certain elements such as the size and alignment of text boxes and other fields, was cumbersome. There were also a limited number of customization options for styling the forms.

description: 123FormBuilder is an excellent choice for quickly and easily creating forms and surveys.
author: Bill Laurel P.
pros: Creating forms and surveys is a breeze with 123FormBuilder's drag-and-drop capabilities. Themes, fonts, and colors can be customized to give the forms a unique look and feel. Integration with third-party applications such as Zapier, MailChimp, and Google Drive is available, and the forms are also optimized for mobile devices. Additionally, 123FormBuilder offers powerful features like surveys, payment processing, file uploads, and more, all at an affordable price.
cons: I am very satisfied with the form we have been using; it provides more options than other forms, so we chose to switch to this form solution.

review_title: Best online electronic form builder tool available in the market
description: My overall experience with 123FormBuilder is great. It's the perfect tool for a form-building solution in the market. I can easily recommend this tool to anyone.
author: Ayush S.
pros: This form builder tool is very easy to use and offers a very quick form building solution. Pricing is also good, provides a great User Interface, and is easy to understand the analytics dashboard. It provides some predesigned form templates that can be used for instant form building, Analytics dashboard is awesome. It also has multiple user support and also offers some great integration with other software tools like - Wix, Wordpress, Paypal, and many more. Online electronic form building is pretty easy and great with this tool.
cons: I'll say nothing is there of which I should be thinking there's a con in this tool. It offers great results. I love the analytics feature and a fully customizable form-building solution. Best out there in the market.

description: 123FormBuilder has been a great experience. The user interface is simple and intuitive, and the features are comprehensive. I was able to quickly create forms and surveys with ease, and the customization options allowed me to tailor the forms to my needs.
author: Sunitha H.
pros: I'm very satisfied with 123FormBuilder due to its user-friendly nature. It enables me to easily create forms and surveys from scratch or customize the existing templates. The drag-and-drop feature makes it straightforward to modify form fields and add media, and I am able to finish the process within a few minutes. Additionally, 123FormBuilder automatically optimizes the forms for mobile devices and lets me embed them into my website. All the collected data is stored securely and can be exported in various formats.
cons: One of the least liked features of 123FormBuilder is that it can be relatively expensive compared to some of the other form-building platforms.

description: 123FormBuilder made easy for us to build form in a minutes which has saves us lot of time and money. Building forms is straightforward process and sharing them to clients is simple. Exporting data one key factor, We can export them in different formats.
author: Nikhil K.
pros: 123FormBuilder has been one the easiest way to build a form and share them securely to your clients. Building a form is as easy as drag and drop. They have multiple fields available to use while building a form
cons: I would still love to have more field to set different types of questionnaires for our different clients. It has lot of customization option but there is still lacking in some features.

description: Overall, 123FormBuilder is a great tool for creating forms and surveys that can be used to collect valuable data.
author: Prudencia F.
pros: It's really easy to create forms, surveys, and polls without having to write any code. I also like how you can customize and style your forms to fit any brand. Plus, you can easily embed forms on your website or share them via social media, email, and even text messages. 123FormBuilder also makes it easy to track responses and analyze the data.
cons: I highly recommend this; I have nothing negative to say.
author_profession: Technician in Energy and Thermal Engineering

author: Joseph A.
pros: I like how resourceful 123FormBuilder has been when it comes to forms automation. 123FormBuilder is so reliable.
cons: No issues concerning 123FormBuilder. 123FormBuilder makes things easier.

review_title: Good and easy form builder cheaper than similar alternatives
description: Good cheap alternative than most enterprise form builder applications
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy intuitive UI with well integrated management features for handling and updating the UI
cons: There is no good preview feature to see how changes affect a form. No realtime editing and publishing

review_title: Easiest to use form builder software out there
description: I used the software to hire staff for our nonprofit. All the applicants who used the forms said they were easy to access and complete.
author: David R.
pros: The software was very easy to use. To build forms all you needed to do was drag and drop elements (multiple choice, choice matrix, short answer fill in) into the document. What was really helpful, which no other software on the market does, is the fact that you could fit up to two column's worth of questions, side by side, in the same document. This allowed you to keep forms short as all of the space was used efficiently. Most other form builders force you to create one big, long column of questions that stretches across multiple pages.
cons: What I liked least was the fact that the software was missing the ability to export forms to PDF or Word. The only way that I was able to share the form with users is with a URL. This is an issue for me because in my line of work I work with clients who do not have reliable internet and yet still need to fill out the forms I send them. With an exportable Word or PDF version of my form, they could do this.

description: I love 123 FormBuilder. It is easy to operate also has a professional presentation. It was essential for me to have a system for registration on the class I offer and to collect feedback from my clientes. I am small business owner and was doing many thing on my own and 123 FormBuilder made my life easier. At the very beginning even the free version was serving me very well covering all my need at that stage of my growth. The simplicity and the professional presentation of 123 FormBuilder made my very beginning possible, actually not just the beginning but the growth possible as well.
author: Samya F.
pros: I love how simple, easy and effective the 123 FormBuilder is. I could create a very professional surveys, online registration and feedback forms for my clients which has helping me to improve my services. Once I create the form I could send the link straight to my client or connect the link to my website page. The software is very intuitive and even if you have no experience with technology you can create professional forms for your clients with no problems. It also has verification before the cliente send the form to ensure that your form are filled by people not robot. Which make it very professional and safe.
cons: I am very satisfied with 123 FormBuilder. I have no problem with this software until now, it has covering all needs of my small business - regards to my forms - pretty well.

description: This is an easy-to-use form builder with payment integration, which is exactly what we needed. However, the fact that we have been trying to get a bug fixed for months and continue to be told they are "working on it" is incredibly frustrating. This has rendered us unable to charge late fees, which is costing us money by the day.
author: Rose B.
pros: 123 FormBuilder is easy to use and allows near-infinite construction and customization.
cons: There is a problem with the way the date fields communicate that has left us unable to charge late fees for months-- and we have not received meaningful support on the issue despite numerous emails back and forth with the company.

review_title: Amazing tool to get feedback from clients!
description: As a user, I would totally recommend 123FormBuilder. I use it monthly and it only takes me minutes to set up the form I need.
author: Favio R.
pros: The best feature if offers is its wide range of alternatives when creating a form. You can choose from a variety of designs which fits most of the scenarios you might need.
cons: As it is an amazing tool with great results and really easy to setup and use, it is also one of the most expensive ones in the market when talking about the enterprise plans. As a user I really enjoy it, but you might want to check out other alternatives if you are in low budget.

description: Overall, the user-friendly interface, extensive customization options, and integrations with third-party tools are some of the features that make 123FormBuilder a popular choice for creating forms and surveys.
author: Chris D.
pros: It supports a wide range of form fields, including file uploads, electronic signatures, and payment processing, which makes it a great choice for businesses of all sizes.
cons: Difficulties in integrating it with specific tools.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: For a web designer it's very important that my customers' websites have a way for their website viewers to have a way to interact with them. 123FormBuilder makes it easy to set this up on the websites we create.
author: Charlie P.
pros: Compared to other form builders I've tried, setting up 123FormBuilder was pretty easy and intuitive. The results have been just what I expected.
cons: The way the results of form entries display in the emails takes a little getting used to.

review_title: 123Formbuilder goes far beyond creating traditional forms!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 123formbuilder has ample options for question type and customization opening the door to meet so many needs such as applications, surveys, reports, etc.
cons: The pricing for 123formbuilder is not too high, however, the options within the lower cost levels are limited. For example, the lowest tier has a question limit that is pretty low.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - Many features (all you need) - Quite cool automation workflows- Good customer support
cons: - It's not so easy (no-brainer) tool, which I usually prefer to use, - UX/UI could be improved, - Sometimes less is more (features-wise)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Very satisfied and would highly recommend
author: MIRANDA F.
pros: Easy to create as many applications as you'd like. Easy to add link to your company website's employment page.
cons: Nothing at this time. Been using for over 2 years and have not experienced any issues as yet

review_title: Great App with a few bugs they need to fix
author: Markus F.
pros: Ease of use of the forms along with the variety of options and customization.
cons: Has some bugs that have taken the developers more than a month now to try to fix.

author: Kerry T.
pros: It is very easy to use, adapt to any webpage, embed rules and payment functions. I haven’t found any other service that is comptable.
cons: Unfortunately, because of security threats, the services gets shut down sometimes by our institution. This is because of phishing warnings due to the use of the forms by free users.

review_title: Very functional app with great and useful options.
author: Ricardo I.
pros: It is a very functional app with great and useful options to share and manage all the information you can get from surveys.
cons: A bit difficult to start and get used to but once you know it is a great app.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Michelle P.
pros: Never got an opportunity to like anything.
cons: First impression was a horrible experience. I initiated the conversation through your chat option to learn about your products and services...DELAYED AND VAGUE RESPONSES...AND THEY NEVER PROVIDED THE INFO I NEEDED TO MAKE A DECISION TO TRY OUT YOUR PRODUCTS FOR MY BUSINESS. This is a great way to welcome a start a relationship.
